ddls:
CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team in the series */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team in the series */,
  "series_result" TEXT /* Predicted result of the series (Home or Away) */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the series */,
  "series_actual" TEXT /* Actual result of the series (Home or Away) */,
  "series_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the series starts */,
  "series_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the series ends */,
  "series_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the series */,
  "series_loser" TEXT /* Team that lost the series */,
  "series_best_of" INTEGER /* Number of games the series is best of (e.g., 7) */,
  "series_status" TEXT /* Current status of the series (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "series_type" TEXT /* Type of series (e.g., Conference Semifinals, Finals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the game belongs to */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number within the series */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team in the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team in the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the game (Home or Away) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_prediction" TEXT /* Predicted result of the game (Home or Away) */,
  "game_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in predicted score */,
  "game_correct" TEXT /* Whether the prediction was correct (Yes or No) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game is played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time when the game starts */,
  "game_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_quarter_scores" TEXT /* JSON array of scores for each quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., senior, junior) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the analyst joined the company */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date when the analyst was last active */,
  "accuracy_rating" REAL /* Overall accuracy rating of the analyst's predictions */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., Western Conference, Eastern Conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prediction is for */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst making the prediction */,
  "series_result" TEXT /* Predicted result of the series (Home or Away) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Predicted result of the game (Home or Away) */,
  "score_prediction" REAL /* Predicted score difference */,
  "game_correct" TEXT /* Whether the prediction was correct (Yes or No) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "prediction_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the analyst about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Current coach of the team */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Current captain of the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors (e.g., Red, White) */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object with social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., First Round, Conference Finals) */,
  "round_status" TEXT /* Current status of the round (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_rounds" (
  "series_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the series-round relationship */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_rounds_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_rounds_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)
